kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

test.name: Midweek Holidays in English

kw.name: Given User opens the application
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "args": ["--disable-blink-features=AutoupgradeMixedContent"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/tmp/results/browser/traces/temp/c0375219-eef7-4e6d-842f-9525f25599de"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://172.20.0.2:5000
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: When User enters year and language
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2025' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) en by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="lang"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2025, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Wednesday	2025-01-01	New Year's Day
Monday	2025-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2025-04-18	Good Friday
Monday	2025-04-21	Easter Monday
Thursday	2025-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2025-05-29	Ascension Day
Friday	2025-06-20	Midsummer Eve
Thursday	2025-12-25	Christmas Day
Friday	2025-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2025, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2025, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Wednesday	2025-01-01	New Year's Day
Monday	2025-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2025-04-18	Good Friday
Monday	2025-04-21	Easter Monday
Thursday	2025-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2025-05-29	Ascension Day
Friday	2025-06-20	Midsummer Eve
Thursday	2025-12-25	Christmas Day
Friday	2025-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2025, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly displays Finnish midweek holidays in English for a standard year, ensuring basic functionality works as expected.

test.name: Midweek Holidays in Finnish

kw.name: When User enters year and language
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2025' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) fi by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="lang"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for Finnish year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: 'Finnish Midweek Holidays
Anna vuosi (1900-2100): Kieli: 
English
Suomi
 Näytä pyhät
Vuonna 2025 on 9 arkipäivälle (ma-pe) osuvaa pyhäpäivää Suomessa:
Viikonpäivä	Päivämäärä	Pyhän nimi
keskiviikko	2025-01-01	Uudenvuodenpäivä
maanantai	2025-01-06	Loppiainen
perjantai	2025-04-18	Pitkäperjantai
maanantai	2025-04-21	2. pääsiäispäivä
torstai	2025-05-01	Vappu
torstai	2025-05-29	Helatorstai
perjantai	2025-06-20	Juhannusaatto
torstai	2025-12-25	Joulupäivä
perjantai	2025-12-26	Tapaninpäivä'

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Anna vuosi (1900-2100): Kieli: English Suomi Näytä pyhät Vuonna 2025 on 9 arkipäivälle (ma-pe) osuvaa pyhäpäivää Suomessa: Viikonpäivä Päivämäärä Pyhän nimi keskiviikko 202...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in Finnish

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: 'Finnish Midweek Holidays
Anna vuosi (1900-2100): Kieli: 
English
Suomi
 Näytä pyhät
Vuonna 2025 on 9 arkipäivälle (ma-pe) osuvaa pyhäpäivää Suomessa:
Viikonpäivä	Päivämäärä	Pyhän nimi
keskiviikko	2025-01-01	Uudenvuodenpäivä
maanantai	2025-01-06	Loppiainen
perjantai	2025-04-18	Pitkäperjantai
maanantai	2025-04-21	2. pääsiäispäivä
torstai	2025-05-01	Vappu
torstai	2025-05-29	Helatorstai
perjantai	2025-06-20	Juhannusaatto
torstai	2025-12-25	Joulupäivä
perjantai	2025-12-26	Tapaninpäivä'

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Anna vuosi (1900-2100): Kieli: English Suomi Näytä pyhät Vuonna 2025 on 9 arkipäivälle (ma-pe) osuvaa pyhäpäivää Suomessa: Viikonpäivä Päivämäärä Pyhän nimi keskiviikko 202...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

Close Browser

kw.name: When User enters year and language
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2020' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) en by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="lang"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2020, there are 8 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Wednesday	2020-01-01	New Year's Day
Monday	2020-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2020-04-10	Good Friday
Monday	2020-04-13	Easter Monday
Friday	2020-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2020-05-21	Ascension Day
Friday	2020-06-19	Midsummer Eve
Friday	2020-12-25	Christmas Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2020, there are 8 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2020, there are 8 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Wednesday	2020-01-01	New Year's Day
Monday	2020-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2020-04-10	Good Friday
Monday	2020-04-13	Easter Monday
Friday	2020-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2020-05-21	Ascension Day
Friday	2020-06-19	Midsummer Eve
Friday	2020-12-25	Christmas Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2020, there are 8 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...

Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2030, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Tuesday	2030-01-01	New Year's Day
Friday	2030-04-19	Good Friday
Monday	2030-04-22	Easter Monday
Wednesday	2030-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2030-05-30	Ascension Day
Friday	2030-06-21	Midsummer Eve
Friday	2030-12-06	Independence Day
Wednesday	2030-12-25	Christmas Day
Thursday	2030-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2030, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day

Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 1900, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Monday	1900-01-01	New Year's Day
Friday	1900-04-13	Good Friday
Monday	1900-04-16	Easter Monday
Tuesday	1900-05-01	May Day
Thursday	1900-05-24	Ascension Day
Friday	1900-06-22	Midsummer Eve
Thursday	1900-12-06	Independence Day
Tuesday	1900-12-25	Christmas Day
Wednesday	1900-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 1900, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: And User should see at least one holiday displayed
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=No holidays found in the results table
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verifies that at least one holiday is shown in the results table

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2100, there are 7 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Friday	2100-01-01	New Year's Day
Wednesday	2100-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2100-03-26	Good Friday
Monday	2100-03-29	Easter Monday
Thursday	2100-05-06	Ascension Day
Friday	2100-06-25	Midsummer Eve
Monday	2100-12-06	Independence Day"

kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=No holidays found in the results table

kw.name: When User verifies min validation for year
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '1500' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verifies that the year input has min validation

kw.name: Then Year input should have min attribute
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verifies the min attribute value

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

test.doc: Verifies that HTML5 validation prevents submission of years below the minimum (1900).

test.name: Handle Empty Year Input

kw.name: Given User opens the application
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "args": ["--disable-blink-features=AutoupgradeMixedContent"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/tmp/results/browser/traces/temp/4db9511c-c418-4ead-8a99-7d65c94459b2"}

kw.name: New Context

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://172.20.0.2:5000
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: When User submits form with empty year
Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) en by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="lang"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Attempts to submit the form without entering a year

kw.name: Then User should see HTML5 validation message
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Year input should have required attribute
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.
Verifies that HTML5 form validation prevents submission with empty required field

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

test.doc: Verifies that the system handles empty year input appropriately through HTML5 validation.

test.name: Handle Invalid Year Format

kw.name: Given User opens the application
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: New Browser

kw.name: When User verifies number input validation
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verifies that year input is type=number which prevents text entry

kw.name: Then User should see year input has number type
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Confirms that the year input field is properly configured as number type

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

test.doc: Verifies that number input prevents non-numeric input via HTML5 validation.

test.name: Year Above Maximum Range

Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2500' in the given field.

kw.name: Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verifies that the year input has max validation

kw.name: Then Year input should have max attribute

kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verifies the max attribute value

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

test.doc: Verifies that HTML5 validation prevents submission of years above the maximum (2100).

test.name: Leap Year Holidays

Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "args": ["--disable-blink-features=AutoupgradeMixedContent"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/tmp/results/browser/traces/temp/a951b8b4-4e83-4d63-959d-d2661c25267f"}

kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://172.20.0.2:5000
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: When User enters year and language
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2000' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) en by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="lang"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2000, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Thursday	2000-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2000-04-21	Good Friday
Monday	2000-04-24	Easter Monday
Monday	2000-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2000-06-01	Ascension Day
Friday	2000-06-23	Midsummer Eve
Wednesday	2000-12-06	Independence Day
Monday	2000-12-25	Christmas Day
Tuesday	2000-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2000, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2000, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Thursday	2000-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2000-04-21	Good Friday
Monday	2000-04-24	Easter Monday
Monday	2000-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2000-06-01	Ascension Day
Friday	2000-06-23	Midsummer Eve
Wednesday	2000-12-06	Independence Day
Monday	2000-12-25	Christmas Day
Tuesday	2000-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 2000, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly calculates holidays for a leap year (e.g., 2000).

test.name: Holidays in Swedish

Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 2025, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Wednesday	2025-01-01	New Year's Day
Monday	2025-01-06	Epiphany
Friday	2025-04-18	Good Friday
Monday	2025-04-21	Easter Monday
Thursday	2025-05-01	May Day
Thursday	2025-05-29	Ascension Day
Friday	2025-06-20	Midsummer Eve
Thursday	2025-12-25	Christmas Day
Friday	2025-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

kw.msg: Selects the option(s) en by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="lang"].

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: "Finnish Midweek Holidays
Enter year (1900-2100): Language: 
English
Suomi
 Show Holidays
In 1901, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri):
Weekday	Date	Holiday Name
Tuesday	1901-01-01	New Year's Day
Friday	1901-04-05	Good Friday
Monday	1901-04-08	Easter Monday
Wednesday	1901-05-01	May Day
Thursday	1901-05-16	Ascension Day
Friday	1901-06-21	Midsummer Eve
Friday	1901-12-06	Independence Day
Wednesday	1901-12-25	Christmas Day
Thursday	1901-12-26	St. Stephen's Day"

${body_text} = Finnish Midweek Holidays Enter year (1900-2100): Language: English Suomi Show Holidays In 1901, there are 9 public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day (Mon-Fri): Weekday Date Holiday Nam...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: And User should see at least one holiday displayed
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=No holidays found in the results table
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verifies that at least one holiday is shown in the results table

kw.name: Close Browser
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the current browser instance
